productTitle: Beats Pill - Portable Bluetooth Speaker - Up to 24H Battery Life, Water Resistant, Bluetooth, Apple & Android Compatible, Seriously Loud Sound for Home, Outdoor and Travel – Statement Red
priceShippingInformation: FREE delivery Thursday, February 19 Or Prime members get FREE delivery Tomorrow, February 15. Join Prime
features: The Beats Pill delivers powerful, room-filling sound. The bigger, bespoke racetrack woofer displaces 90% more air volume, packing more of a punch with deeper, fuller bass.
The Beats Pill has up to 24 hours of battery life for all-day playback and can be used to charge your phone or other devices via USB-C cable.
The portable speaker is IP67-rated for dust and water resistance3 for outstanding durability and includes a removable lanyard and soft-grip silicone backing to make it easy to take with you.
The redesigned tweeter provides extra stability for crisp highs and rich mid-range tones while the woofer’s material and structure helps minimize low-end distortion even at high volumes.
Enjoy high-resolution lossless audio from your Beats Pill by connecting it to your laptop or other compatible devices via the USB-C cable.
Easily pair two Beats Pill speakers for twice the output experience in Amplify mode or Stereo mode.
Apple and Android compatibility – including instant one-touch pairing and automatic pairing across your other devices, plus Find My or Find My Device.
Take calls and activate your voice assistant directly from a paired Beats Pill.

reviews.text: This is my third Beats pill, first of this new generation. It's a bit smaller, lighter and easier to carry around, especially with the new wrist strap. It sounds amazing, right along with what you come to expect from Beats and Apple, it doesn't disappoint. The biggest difference I've noticed is how quickly it pairs with devices compared to previous models. It's also incredibly easy to switch between devices after the initial pairing of each; I just start playing whatever media on iphone, ipad, or macbook and then select the pill for the output and it connects in a second. It also now shows up on Find My along with your other devices, and from my understanding, works the same as an AirTag which is pretty cool. The only downside is the power button. It took a while to get used to and sometimes I still wind up trying two or three times to power it up or down because I didn't hold it down long enough. I've also had an issue where the audio cuts out for a couple seconds here and there but haven't pinned down the cause of the interference. Overall it's a solid speaker, great sound, very loud for its size, longer battery life and better connectivity. They're even cheaper than the previous model and go on sale often so you can't go wrong.
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on October 16, 2025
reviews.title: A nice improvement from the previous model

reviews.text: This is the best speaker I have ever had! The color is vibrant and bright. Personally, the red is my favorite but they all are so vibrant and saturated, and don’t get me started on the sound quality. The sound quality this is by far better than any speaker I have ever owned or heard! It is super easy to use and automatically pairs to iPhone. For the price, the sound quality is truly just astonishing. It is super easy to bring along, and the strap on it is super strong and can be jostled around without breaking. The battery life is also amazing. I usually use it in lower volume, but it lasts 40 hours easily when fully charged and I have seen it go to 50! It works better than described and really feels like the artist is singing right in front of me with the highly advanced sound quality. This is truly the best speaker to have ever existed and it would be a mistake not to buy it.
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 26, 2025
reviews.title: Vibrant Colors, Vibrant Sound, Truly the Best Speaker to Have Ever Existed!!

reviews.text: I’m honestly impressed with the Beats Pill. The sound quality is way better than I expected for its size—clear vocals, punchy bass, and no distortion even at high volume. It fills the room easily, and the Bluetooth connection is super quick and stable. The battery life lasts for hours, which makes it perfect for the beach, workouts, or just having it around the house. The design is sleek and lightweight, so it’s easy to carry around, and it feels solid and well-made. Overall, this speaker delivers powerful sound in a compact package. Definitely worth it!
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 3, 2025
reviews.title: Highly recommended

reviews.text: Great sound for the price. We have an outdoor speaker that gets really loud, but there's not much definition and the highs have degraded over time. This speaker sounds really really good to my ears. Works well despite use in not-so-great environments. Outdoors and in the kitchen. Small kitchen, its never more than 2-3 feet from the stove/sink/dishwasher. Has held up well and still sounds great. Have purchased several for family members. Connects without having to download an app etc, good for less tech-savvy family members. One thing to note: we were buying the red ones bc they look so good. The red really announces itself. Became a theft target. We've replaced with a black unit.
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 28, 2026
reviews.title: Great sound

reviews.text: Amazing and powerful speaker. Great sound quality and enjoy the integration with Apple, to see battery level and other options. Battery seems ok right now, but I'm only using for home use so fine with it. Highly recommended.
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 18, 2026
reviews.title: Amazing Speaker!

reviews.text: I found this on a good sale for $100, and it’s definitely worth it at that price. It has good, clear sound with good bass, holds its charge for an eight hour shift when I bring it to work, charges out to my iPhone, connects with a USB-C cable and integrates well with my Mac. The design also just feels good in my hand. At the full price of $150, however, I feel like there are better options out there. The sound is good, but other speakers at a similar price would probably carry farther. Volume really impacts the battery, as I usually keep it down a bit to get through an eight-hour shift (which likely influences what I wrote above). Also, the instructions make an embarrassing omission about how to turn it off. (You have to hold the left button for about a second, something I had to learn through a web search.) Still, it’s a good little speaker that’s worth what I paid for it. If you’re in the Apple ecosystem or you find it at a good price, then this is a great option. Otherwise, you’ll want to consider all of your options. Personally, I’m quite happy with mine.
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on May 28, 2025
reviews.title: Great for the right price

reviews.text: I bought these for my sons for Christmas, and they rock out every day now! The Beats Pill, for its small footprint, has a HUGE sound! The bass is great, the vocals are crisp, and you can carry this around with you everywhere. I am going to buy two more Beats Pills so my sons can pair them and revel in their music some more! These are an excellent speaker purchase, with which my sons and I are incredibly pleased. Having a microphone for use with Siri and phone calls takes it up another notch. The only negative: there is no adapter/charging block included, but that is not a game changer. It’s just good to know up front. Thanks Dre!!! I don’t know how you made these from Em’s basement!
reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 10, 2026
reviews.title: Small, cute speaker; large, AMAZING sound!

reviews.text: I love Beatspill. I have bought these a total 5 times, for myself and gift for friends. A great product with awesome sound! Portable, water resistant, and can track it, if misplaced, with FindMy. I’m sure I will purchase again. ! And can connect 2 beats pills for parties or different rooms in the house. Love Music, Love Beatspill!
